name: four-leaf-clover-jewelry-shop
description: Professional online jewelry shop for handcrafted four-leaf clover jewelry

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:products" "npm run dev:orders"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build:auth && npm run build:products && npm run build:orders
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:products" "npm run start:orders"

author: Four Leaf Clover Jewelry
